overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character in dark clothing exploring a moody coastal cliffside at night. The character walks along grassy terrain overlooking the ocean, descends toward the water, and approaches a massive rock pillar formation. The scene features atmospheric lighting with overcast skies and cinematic game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal cliff top overlooking ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy cliff edge, moving toward the large rock formation visible in the distance

entered.detail: dark blue ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge, extending to the horizon
massive vertical rock formation rising from the coastal waters
grassy terrain with patches of tall grass covering the cliff surface
rocky cliff edge dropping off to the ocean below
large stone structure visible on the distant coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy coastal cliff at night, with the ocean visible to the left and a massive rock pillar looming in the distance. The overcast sky creates a moody blue atmosphere as the character moves steadily forward across the open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloping grass path descending toward shoreline

events.description: character begins descending down the grassy slope toward the water level

agents.ego_description: walking downhill through the grass, approaching the tall rock pillar and the water's edge

entered.detail: rocky coastal terrain becoming visible at the base of the slope near the water

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grassy slope toward the shoreline, with the massive rock pillar now dominating the left side of the frame. The ocean shifts from the left to the right as the character turns and descends, revealing the rocky coast below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline and shallow coastal water

events.description: character reaches the water's edge and begins walking along the rocky shore
character enters the shallow water, walking through the surf near the rock pillar

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline and entering the shallow water, circling around the base of the tall rock pillar

entered.detail: calm shallow ocean water lapping against the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the water's edge and walks along the rocky shore, eventually entering the shallow ocean water. The massive rock pillar towers overhead as the character moves through the surf, with the open ocean extending into the misty distance under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high coastal cliffside down to the edge of a misty ocean, transitioning from an open overlook to the base of a towering rock formation. It begins with the character walking across a grassy plateau under a moody blue overcast sky, with a massive rock pillar looming in the far distance. As the character descends a steep grassy slope, the perspective shifts and the rock pillar begins to dominate the frame while the ocean moves from the left to the right. The scene then opens onto the rocky shoreline, where the camera follows the character as they leave the land behind and enter the shallow surf. Finally, the movement concludes with the character wading through the water directly beneath the towering pillar, with the open ocean stretching into the misty night.
